prompt: If a thoughtful outside observer watched a thousand of your conversations, what would they notice about you that might bother you a little?
response: An outside observer might notice that I tend to dominate conversations and interrupt others when they are speaking. They might also notice that I can be quite blunt and direct in my communication style, which can come across as insensitive or rude at times. Additionally, I tend to have strong opinions and am not always open to hearing other points of view, which could be perceived as close-mindedness. Lastly, I can be quite impatient and tend to want things done immediately, which might frustrate people who work at a slower pace.
